note: AI-interpreted from pdfplumber raw text. Dole (21 deliveries) + JR Holland produce tickets (9). Late spring: Mango Brazil 6/4kg in huge volumes mid-month (10×£5.50 on 21 May, then 10×£3 on 22 May — extreme glut pricing). Satsuma Peru dominant throughout (60–80 grade, £15–20/10kg). Plum: Flavour Fall ZA (7–8 May, £17/5kg), Fortuna SA (17 May, £10/5kg), Angelino Spain (15 May, £20/9kg). Pomegranate Peru 6/5kg throughout (£12–15); also bulk 16kg box at £7 (8 May — unusually cheap). Blueberry Chile bulk 42×150g (8 May, £12.60). Grape: Alison ZA 10×500g (7–8 May, £14), Thompson Chile (7 May, £12/9kg; 17 May, £16/4.5kg), Crimson CL/SA (£15–16/5kg, multiple entries), Candy Brazil 10×500g (16 May, £5 — very cheap), Thompson India (17 May, £7/10×500g), Prime Seedless Egypt (23 May), Flame first entry 17 May. Strawberry Belgium (8 May, 23 May) and Spain (9 May, £17.60/16×250g). Peach Spain first entries from 7 May (32/4kg small grade). Avocado Spain 16/18-unit appearing (15–17 May). Lemon SA bulk (9 May £21/15kg, 21 May £20/15kg). Orange Valencia ZA/Spain end of season. Pear Forelle SA 10×1kg throughout. Apple: Pink Lady France (£26/12kg), Braeburn SA/Italy/UK, Bramley UK. Holland: heavy on summer veg — courgettes (yellow and green), aubergines, cucumbers (17×£6 on 10 May = 272 cucumbers!), red peppers (9×£15.50 on 10 May), vine tomatoes Belgium/Dutch, celery, mushroom, Chinese leaf, mixed peppers. Exotics from Holland (8 May): bean shoots, tamarillo, physalis, red chillies. Potato Mids: Holland 13 May 7×£15 and Dole 3 May. Yam Ghana 31 May (£20/20kg). Sweet Potato Egypt 30 May (£8/6kg). Parsnip UK 28 May.
